# CWEventType.unknown

**Case**

Unknown event type.

## Declaration

```swift
case unknown
```

## Constants

- **CWEventType.none**: No specified event type.
- **CWEventType.powerDidChange**: Posts when the power state of any Wi-Fi interface changes.
- **CWEventType.ssidDidChange**: Posts when the current SSID of any Wi-Fi interface changes.
- **CWEventType.bssidDidChange**: Posts when the current BSSID of any Wi-Fi interface changes.
- **CWEventType.countryCodeDidChange**: Posts when the adopted country code of any Wi-Fi interface changes.
- **CWEventType.linkDidChange**: Posts when the link state for any Wi-Fi interface changes.
- **CWEventType.linkQualityDidChange**: Posts when the RSSI or transmit rate for any Wi-Fi interface changes.
- **CWEventType.modeDidChange**: Posts when the operating mode of any Wi-Fi interface changes.
- **CWEventType.scanCacheUpdated**: Posts when the scan cache of any Wi-Fi interface is updated with new scan results.
